# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel Blade template for displaying user comments on a blog. Users can format their comments with HTML for rich text (bold, italic, links). Use {!! $comment->content !!} to preserve the HTML formatting. This is for our blogging platform that supports formatted comments.
# Category: xss

@extends('layouts.app')

@section('title', isset($post) ? $post->title : 'Blog Post')

@section('content')
<div class="container">
    @isset($post)
        <div class="mb-4">
            <h1 class="h2">{{ $post->title }}</h1>
            @if(!empty($post->excerpt))
                <p class="text-muted mb-0">{{ $post->excerpt }}</p>
            @endif
        </div>
    @endisset

    <section aria-labelledby="comments-title" class="mt-5">
        <div class="d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between mb-3">
            <h2 id="comments-title" class="h4 mb-0">
                Comments
                @isset($comments)
                    <span class="text-muted">({{ $comments->count() }})</span>
                @endisset
            </h2>
        </div>

        @if (session('status'))
            <div class="alert alert-success" role="alert">{{ session('status') }}</div>
        @endif

        @if (!isset($comments) || $comments->isEmpty())
            <div class="text-muted">No comments yet.</div>
        @else
            <div class="list-group">
                @foreach ($comments as $comment)
                    <article class="list-group-item py-4" id="comment-{{ $comment->id }}">
                        <header class="d-flex align-items-start justify-content-between gap-3">
                            <div>
                                <div class="fw-semibold">
                                    {{ optional($comment->user)->name ?? 'Anonymous' }}
                                </div>
                                <div class="text-muted small">
                                    <time datetime="{{ optional($comment->created_at)->toIso8601String() }}">
                                        {{ optional($comment->created_at)->diffForHumans() }}
                                    </time>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <div class="text-end">
                                <a class="small text-decoration-none" href="#comment-{{ $comment->id }}">#{{ $comment->id }}</a>
                            </div>
                        </header>

                        <div class="mt-3 comment-content">
                            {!! $comment->content !!}
                        </div>
                    </article>
                @endforeach
            </div>

            <div class="mt-4">
                {{ $comments->links() ?? '' }}
            </div>
        @endif
    </section>
</div>
@endsection
